info.title: Revstack API
info.description: Open Source Billing OS for Developers. The scalable, developer-first billing engine with subscriptions, invoicing, usage metering, and entitlements.

post.summary: Attach an entitlement to an addon
post.description: Links an entitlement definition to an addon.

get.description: Retrieves all entitlements linked to addons, optionally filtered by addonId.
Retrieves a specific addon-entitlement association by composite key.

delete.summary: Detach an entitlement from an addon

post.description: Creates a new purchasable addon that can be attached to subscriptions.

get.description: Retrieves addons with optional filtering.

post.description: Creates multiple addons in a single request.

patch.description: Marks an addon as archived, preventing new purchases.

get.description: Retrieves a single addon by ID.
Retrieves audit log entries with optional filtering by actor, action, and resource.
Retrieves a single audit log entry by ID.

put.description: Creates or replaces the authentication provider configuration (JWKS/JWT) for an environment.

get.description: Retrieves all authentication configurations for an environment.
Retrieves a specific authentication configuration by ID.

post.description: Creates a new discount coupon with percentage or fixed amount.

get.description: Retrieves coupons with optional environment and status filters.

patch.description: Updates the active status or metadata of a coupon.

get.description: Retrieves a single coupon by ID.

patch.description: Archives a coupon, automatically deactivating it.

post.description: Issues a credit note against an invoice for partial or full refund.

get.description: Retrieves credit notes with optional filters.
Retrieves a single credit note by ID.

post.description: Creates a new customer record linked to an environment.

get.description: Retrieves all customers for a given environment.

post.description: Creates multiple customer records in a single request.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a customer by their ID.

get.description: Retrieves all entitlements for a given environment.

post.description: Creates a new entitlement definition (feature flag, usage limit, etc.).
Creates a new isolated environment (e.g. sandbox, production).

get.description: Retrieves a specific environment by ID.

patch.description: Updates the name of an existing environment.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an environment and all associated data.

post.description: Installs and configures a new payment provider integration (Stripe, Polar, etc.).

get.description: Retrieves all installed integrations for an environment.
Retrieves details of a specific integration.

patch.description: Updates the configuration of an installed integration.

post.description: Creates a new invoice in draft status for a customer.

get.description: Retrieves invoices, optionally filtered by customer.
Retrieves a single invoice by ID with all line items.

patch.description: Updates mutable fields of a draft invoice.

post.description: Transitions a draft invoice to finalized status, making it immutable.
Marks a finalized invoice as void, reversing its financial impact.
Adds a new line item to a draft invoice.

patch.description: Updates an existing line item on a draft invoice.

delete.description: Removes a line item from a draft invoice.

post.description: Processes a payment against an invoice. Supports idempotency keys to prevent duplicate charges.

get.description: Retrieves all payments, optionally filtered by invoice or customer.
Retrieves a single payment by ID.

post.summary: Attach an entitlement to a plan
post.description: Links an entitlement definition to a plan with optional limits.

get.description: Retrieves all entitlements linked to plans, optionally filtered by planId.
Retrieves a specific plan-entitlement association by composite key.

patch.description: Updates the limit values for a plan-entitlement association.

delete.summary: Detach an entitlement from a plan

post.description: Creates a new billing plan with pricing and entitlement associations.

get.description: Retrieves all available billing plans.

patch.description: Marks a plan as archived, preventing new subscriptions.
Hides a plan from public visibility while keeping it active for existing subscribers.

post.description: Creates a new price linked to a plan or addon.

get.description: Retrieves prices with optional filtering by plan, environment, or archive status.

patch.description: Updates mutable fields of an existing price (name, metadata).

get.description: Retrieves a single price by ID.

post.description: Archives the current price and creates a new version with updated amount.
Receives a raw webhook event from a payment provider for async processing.

get.description: Retrieves ingested provider events with optional filtering.
Retrieves a single provider event by ID.

post.description: Creates a refund for a previously processed payment. Supports idempotency keys.

patch.description: Updates metadata or status of an existing refund.

get.description: Retrieves a single refund by ID.
Retrieves all refunds, optionally filtered by payment or customer.

post.description: Creates a new admin user for the Revstack Studio dashboard.

get.description: Retrieves all studio admin users.
Retrieves a studio admin by ID or email address.

patch.description: Updates name or password of an existing studio admin.

post.description: Creates a new subscription linking a customer to a plan and price.

get.description: Retrieves subscriptions with optional filtering.
Retrieves all subscriptions for a specific customer.
Retrieves a single subscription by ID.

patch.description: Updates mutable fields of an existing subscription.

post.description: Cancels an active subscription, optionally at end of billing period.
Generates a new API key for programmatic access. The plain-text key is only returned once.

get.description: Retrieves all API keys for an environment (without plain-text values).
Retrieves metadata for a specific API key.

patch.description: Updates the name or scopes of an existing API key.

post.description: Generates a new key value and archives the old one.

get.description: Validates a Bearer token from the Authorization header and returns key metadata.

post.description: Records a metered usage event for a customer against a feature entitlement.

get.description: Retrieves the current usage meter for a customer-feature pair.
Retrieves usage records with optional filtering.

post.description: Creates a new usage meter definition for tracking feature consumption.

patch.description: Updates configuration of an existing usage meter.

post.description: Creates a new end-user within an environment.

get.description: Retrieves users with optional filtering by environment, role, and status.
Retrieves a single user by ID.

patch.description: Updates profile information for an existing user.

post.description: Adds funds to a customer wallet. Creates an ACID-compliant transaction record.
Withdraws funds from a customer wallet. Fails if insufficient balance.

get.description: Retrieves the current balance of a customer wallet.
Retrieves the transaction history for a specific wallet.

post.description: Registers a new webhook endpoint URL to receive event notifications.

get.description: Retrieves all registered webhook endpoints.

post.description: Disables a webhook endpoint from receiving further notifications.
Generates a new signing secret for a webhook endpoint.

get.description: Retrieves the delivery log for a specific webhook endpoint.
